loot_room_rules: Loot rooms should branch from corridors rather than replace the critical path.
Loot rooms must have one readable entrance doorway.
Locked loot rooms require either a key, hack, elite guard, event clear, or boss clear condition.
Loot sockets should be away from the entrance line so rewards feel spatially intentional.
Ambush caches may spawn traps or guards but must not block reward pickup after clear.
top_down_readability: Loot rooms should read as small side pockets, vaults, side labs, or caches from the high-isometric camera.
